arts.ttl: Man Utd's Class of 92 sent stark reminder as Man City show their dominance
arts.sum: Manchester United's Class of 92 often had it their own way during their playing careers, but with some in attendance - and other notable in their absence - they watched Salford get thrashed

arts.ttl: Why Arsenal will wear all-white kit for huge Man Utd FA Cup clash
arts.sum: The unique design is part of Arsenal's No More Red initiative, a joint venture launched alongside adidas to raise awareness of the dangers of knife crime which exist in London and beyond. That style has been in place across the subsequent century, but on Sunday afternoon, Arsenal will host Manchester United in the third round of FA Cup draped entirely in white - without a drop of red in sight.

arts.ttl: Teenage defender Leon set for Man Utd medical
arts.sum: Teenage Paraguayan defender Diego Leon is flying to England to complete a medical for a move to Manchester United.

arts.ttl: Official | Monaco sign former Arsenal forward Mika Biereth from Sturm Graz
arts.sum: AS Monaco have officially announced the signing of Mika Biereth (21) from Austrian outfit SK Sturm Graz. The Danish U21 who was born in London developed in the Arsenal academy…

arts.ttl: Man Utd predicted lineup vs Arsenal
arts.sum: The world expected a Liverpool trouncing at Anfield last Sunday, but a new and improved Red Devils gave as good as they got on Merseyside and were good value for their 2-2 draw . United doubtlessly benefitted from the gap between games, and Amorim has enjoyed the first full week off since the November international break heading into Sunday's FA Cup third-round tie at Arsenal.

arts.ttl: Man Utd reunion at AC Milan: Ibrahimovic teases Rashford signing
arts.sum: Zlatan Ibrahimovic has claimed that 'everyone wants to play for Milan ' when quizzed about his club's links with former Manchester United teammate Marcus Rashford . Man Utd reunion at AC Milan: Ibrahimovic teases Rashford signing

arts.ttl: AC Milan chief Zlatan Ibrahimovic breaks silence on Marcus Rashford with Man United talks update
arts.sum: Manchester United transfer news as Zlatan Ibrahimovic opens up on signing Marcus Rashford after Milan links

arts.ttl: Never mind Premier League rules - keeping Kobbie Mainoo at Man Utd should be non-negotiable
arts.sum: England star has been linked with a possible move to Chelsea as Old Trafford bosses grapple with PSR regulations and Mainoo looks for a massive pay increase

arts.ttl: Trent Alexander-Arnold learned valuable lesson about Arne Slot in aftermath of Man Utd struggles
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold's Liverpool future remains up in the air amid interest from Real Madrid but the Reds defender might look to his manager for inspiration on how to silence the noise

arts.ttl: Rashford, Mainoo sagas sum up Man Utd's identity crisis
arts.sum: There was a time when Manchester United wanted Marcus Rashford to be the reference point and the poster boy of the club.
